title: Mental Connection

description.paragraph1: We created a streaming platform directly connected to the cerebral cortex.
description.paragraph2: The user can watch series using a phone, watch, wall projector, or directly through neural implants.
description.paragraph3: The problem is that the original system was built by an AI trained exclusively on 2012 tutorials.
description.paragraph4: Now each interface behaves differently, no one understands the code, and every update breaks some device.

bullet_point.bullet1: Users access the system through extremely different interfaces.
bullet_point.bullet2: Streams [b]cannot lag[/b], even with visual changes.
bullet_point.bullet3: New forms of visualization emerge constantly. But all need to be [b]recognizable[/b] to the user – they glance and understand what to do.

footnote: [i]~ Streaming directly to the brain? Now I can watch series while I sleep.[/i]

bug1.description: Which characteristic of MVC can hinder integration with legacy systems?
